title: pelargonium atrofulgens
intro: Pelargonium atrofulgens is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, commonly known as the South African Geranium. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Pelargonium atrofulgens include relief from fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium atrofulgens are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
